title: Create: Advanced Logistics
description: Expanding the Create item logistics system with various useful features
body:
Create: Advanced Logistics is a work-in-progress addon for Create which intends to add several useful features for advanced logistics systems.

There are currently a few implemented features:
- The Redstone Radio (which is not *specifically* logistically-related but is useful) is a computer-controlled (via CC:Tweaked) Redstone Link which can both receive and transmit, albeit only on one frequency.
- The Package Wormhole is a block which consumes Ender Pearls (at a configurable rate) to teleport packages across distances, or even interdimensionally (if enabled).
- The Package Content Filter is basically an Item Filter for the _contents_ of packages, allowing more complex sorting.

Planned features include **(these are not yet implemented)**:
- Wireless stock tickers
- Stock tickers with integrated crafting, for one-off crafts that don't make sense to automate
- The Portable Wormhole, an item which can receive packages teleported by a Package Wormhole wirelessly and in a player's inventory
